expectedBehavior: Both expand/collapse and clicking the edit pencil should cause the bottom border of the item card to expand naturally and seamlessly, like the position of the subsequent cards does. Top border doesn’t move
title: Expand chevron doesn’t animate bottom border of item card. It just snaps open. But the i cards below it have their position animate fine. But the card itself doesn’t. When you expand the chevron, the bottom of the card does animate well. But not when collapse. And update doesn’t animate either. The subsequent card position animated fine
